improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for business owners, traders, and professionals. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:url" content="https://www.gdn.ai/"><meta property="og:image" content="https://www.gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches today.">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by telling users exactly what Gideon offers. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure the homepage displays professionally when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. The copy highlights the free trial offer to encourage clicks without overpromising. Placeholder og:image should be replaced with an actual branded preview image.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a powerful workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches and see Gideon in action."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies its purpose, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while clearly communicating the free trial offer to reduce friction and encourage engagement. The copy is concise, benefit-driven, and avoids unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, with flexible monthly or annual billing options—annual plans save you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and professional assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the conversion point where free users hit the paywall, reducing friction by clearly explaining what comes next and reinforcing the value and affordability of membership. It preemptively answers a common concern, building trust and guiding prospects toward signup.
